name: Apple Pie Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1-1/4 cups Apples, unpeeled and finely chopped (about 1 to 2 apples)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Coat a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, oats, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the Egg, Egg white, brown sugar, honey, and oil with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth.
5. Add the buttermilk to the egg mixture and mix well.
6. Stir in the flour and apple mixture by hand just until combined.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 50 to 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center of the loaf comes out clean. The crust may crack slightly.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan on a wire rack for about 10 minutes.
10. Turn the cooled bread onto the wire rack and allow it to cool completely before slicing.
11. Makes 1 loaf.
